title: Sour Crisp Light French Mulukhiyah Stir-fry
description: This dish combines light French cuisine elements with a traditional Middle Eastern mulukhiyah base, seasoned with tangy components and served as a keto-friendly snack or side.
instructions: Blend Mulukhiyah with Sunflower Seeds, Hummus Mix, Tomato Sauce, Cilantro, and Lemon Juice until smooth.
Add minced garlic to the mixture for extra flavor.
Season the mixture as desired, adjusting spices like cumin or paprika to taste.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Pour in the mixture and cook for about 5 minutes on each side until crisp on both sides.
Serve hot with a sprinkle of additional fresh cilantro.
